member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.Constants
member.summary: Datalog service constants.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.Constants.LevelSixPrefix
member.summary: Level 6 comnt prefix.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.Constants.LevelSixNewLinePrefix
member.summary: Level 6 comnt prefix with a new line.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.Constants.ItuffSnippetNoDataValue
member.summary: ItuffStrDb get lines, no data result.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogService
member.summary: DatalogService implementation class. Partial class for SDK.
Partial implementation of DatalogService for Storage services.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Comnt format class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: If Midas is enabled or not.

member.summary: Composite class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Ituff format base.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: If Midas is enabled or not.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.TNamePostFix
member.summary: Gets or sets the postFix to add after the tname section.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.TNamePreFix
member.summary: Gets or sets the preFix to add before the tname section.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.CustomTname
member.summary: Gets or sets a custom tname to use for tname token.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.TssidAttribute
member.summary: Gets or sets the tssid attribute.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.OutputLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the ituff output level.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.Stream
member.summary: Gets the underline steam that holds the ituff content.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.ClearItuff
member.summary: Clear stream object.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.WriteLine(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Write a line to stream.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.GetTnameForPrint
member.summary: GetTnameForPrint.
member.returns: Returns tname from current instance.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.WriteTname
member.summary: Write tname line to datalog.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.WriteTname(System.String)
member.summary: Write tname line to datalog.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.WriteTname(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Write tname line to datalog with a postfix counter value.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.WriteTname(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Write tname line to datalog with a postfix counter value.
member.param: instance name to use for datalogging.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ItuffFormat.WriteTssidAttributes
member.summary: Write tssid token if enabled by configuration.

member.summary: Gets the underline steam that holds the ituff content.

member.summary: Get alternative instance name if exist, otherwise get current test instance name.
member.returns: Alt instance name, otherwise current test instance name.

member.summary: Write a line.

member.summary: Write a line.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.TsattrsFormat
member.summary: Tsattrs token formatter implementation.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.UddTypeFormat
member.summary: UddType class.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.UddTypeFormat.stream
member.summary: Gets the underline steam that holds the ituff content.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IComntFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print comments to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IComntFormat.IncludeTnameInPrint(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether to include tname in the first print of the same comntWriter object. Tname is not included by Default.
member.param: bool for whether to include tname in the first print. Defaults to false.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IComntFormat.SetData(System.String)
member.summary: Takes in a value and outputs it to the ItuffWriter in the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_comnt_[value] Clears existing Data.
member.exception: When the input string is empty or contains a white space.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IComntFormat.AddData(System.String)
member.summary: Takes in a value and outputs it to the ItuffWriter in the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_comnt_[value] Does not clear existing Data.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IComntFormat.ClearData
member.summary: Clears ituff writer data.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IComntFormat.ForceItuffLevel(System.String)
member.summary: Will force the writer ituff level. Allowed values are "3", "2" or "0".

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IComntFormat.AddFailPins(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Add fail pins with pin finder formatting. 2_comnt_failpins_{ [failPins] } .

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IComntFormat.AddFailPins(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},Prime.DatalogService.FormatType)
member.summary: Add fail pins with pin finder formatting. 2_comnt_failpins_{ [failPins] } .

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ICompositeFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print Composite data to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ICompositeFormat.SetData(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.Double}})
member.summary: Outputs to the ItuffWriter using the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_category_[category] 2_composite_[data_int1]_[data_double1] ... 2_composite_[data_intN]_[data_doubleN].
member.param: List of int, double pairs to be printed under composite tags.
member.exception: When the input category or data are empty or the category string contains a white space.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ICompositeFormat.SetData(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.Double}},Prime.DatalogService.Unit)
member.summary: Outputs to the ItuffWriter using the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_category_[category] 2_composite_[data_int1]_[data_double1] ... 2_composite_[data_intN]_[data_doubleN] 2_msunit_[msunit].
member.param: List of int, double pairs to be printed under composite tags.
member.exception: When the input category or data are empty or the category string contains a white space.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ICompositeStringStringFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print Composite String String Data to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ICompositeStringStringFormat.SetData(System.Int32,Prime.DatalogService.Unit,Prime.DatalogService.Unit,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_testflow_[TestFlowName] 2_testflowseq_[testFlowSeq] 2_funits_[funits] 2_msunit_[msunits] 2_category_[category] 2_cmpstrstr_[forcedValue]![measuredValue]![pinId]![comment].
member.param: Integer value for test flow sequence.
Pin ID of cmpstrstr tag. Limited to 12 characters.
Comment of cmpstrstr tag. Limited to 12 characters.
member.exception: It's thrown when: 1. The category, comment or pinId fields are empty. 2. The comment or pinId fields have a lenght bigger then 12.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IDatalogFormatBase
member.summary: Defines the base interface for all formatters.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IDatalogFormatBase.GetTName
member.summary: Gets tname of the datalog data.
member.returns: the tname of the format , if applicable.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IDatalogFormatBase.ToFormattedString
member.summary: Converts ScanFi contents into a string.
member.returns: String representation of ScanFi contents.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IDatalogFormatBase.ApplyFormatting
member.summary: Will create the underline formatter Stream. Without creating a literal string.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IDatalogFormatBase.GetStream
member.summary: Returns the underline stream object.
member.returns: underline stream object.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IFailDataFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print Faildata to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IFailDataFormat.SetData(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.UInt32})
member.summary: Outputs to the ItuffWriter using the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_fdpmv_[mainRMA] 2_fcpmv_[subrRMA] 2_fspmv_[scanRMA] 2_pttrn_[pattern] 2Vcont_[cycleCount] 2_faildata_{[failData]}.
member.param: List of strings representing pattern to be appended to pttrn tag.
List of strings to be appended to failData tag.
member.exception: When the fail data does not have any elements.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IFailDataFormat.SetData(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.UInt32},Prime.DatalogService.FormatType)
member.summary: Outputs to the ItuffWriter using the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_fdpmv_[mainRMA] 2_fcpmv_[subrRMA] 2_fspmv_[scanRMA] 2_pttrn_[pattern] 2Vcont_[cycleCount] 2_faildata_{[failData]}.
member.param: List of strings representing pattern to be appended to pttrn tag.
List of strings to be appended to failData tag.
member.exception: When the fail data does not have any elements.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IFailDataFormat.SetData(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.UInt32})
member.summary: Outputs to the ItuffWriter using the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_faildata_{[failData]}.
member.param: List of strings to be appended to failData tag.
member.exception: When the fail data does not have any elements.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IFailDataFormat.SetData(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.UInt32},Prime.DatalogService.FormatType)
member.summary: Outputs to the ItuffWriter using the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_faildata_{[failData]}.
member.param: List of strings to be appended to failData tag.
member.exception: When the fail data does not have any elements.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IItuffFormat
member.summary: Interface shared by by ItuffFormats.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IItuffFormat.ForceAries
member.summary: Forces Ituff to be printed to Aries only. Will override Midas output.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IItuffFormat.SetTnamePostfix(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the postfix for printing to the ItuffWriter. Postfix will be appended in the format: [level]_tname_[testInstanceName]_[postfix] Where [level] and [testInstanceName] will be auto populated based on test instance and Midas/Aries info.
member.param: String to be appended to tname.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IItuffFormat.SetTnamePrefix(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the prefix for printing to the ItuffWriter. Prefix will be appended in the format: [level]_tname_[prefix]_[testInstanceName] Where [level] and [testInstanceName] will be auto populated based on test instance and Midas/Aries info.
member.param: String to be appended to tname.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IItuffFormat.SetTssidAttributes(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the Tssid attributes to the ItuffWriter. 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_tssid_[data] 2_strgalt[type]_[value].
member.param: Data to be printed in this attribute.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IItuffFormat.SetCustomTname(System.String)
member.summary: Enables setting custom tname.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IItuffUltWriter
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print ULT to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IItuffUltWriter.SetData(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Takes in a value and outputs it to the ItuffWriter in the format: 2_lsep 2_tname_[InstanceName] 2_trlot_[lot] 2_trwafer_[wafer] 2_trxloc_[xloc] 2_tryloc_[yloc] .

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IItuffUltWriter.SetDataSort(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Takes in a value and outputs it to the ItuffWriter in the format: 2_lsep 2_tname_[InstanceName] 2_comnt_trlot_[lot] 2_comnt_trwafer_[wafer] 2_comnt_trxloc_[xloc] 2_comnt_tryloc_[yloc] .

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IItuffUltWriter.AddPsnBinary(System.String)
member.summary: Takes in a value and outputs it to the ItuffWriter in the format: 2_psnbinary_[FuseString] .

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IMrsltFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print Mrslt data to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IMrsltFormat.SetPrecision(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Sets number of digits to display after decimal point for Mrslt. If function is not called default will be 4.
member.param: Number of digits to print after decimal. Accepts only positive integers.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IMrsltFormat.SetData(System.Double)
member.summary: Takes in a value and writes Mrslt to the ItuffWriter in the format: [level]_tname_[testInstanceName] [level]_mrslt_[value] Where [level] and [testInstanceName] will be auto populated based on test instance and Midas/Aries info.
member.param: Value to be used as mrslt.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IMrsltFormat.SetData(System.Double,Prime.DatalogService.Unit)
member.summary: Takes in a value and a unit and writes Mrslt to the ItuffWriter in the format: [level]_tname_[testInstanceName] [level]_mrslt_[value] [level]_msunit_[unit] Where [level] and [testInstanceName] will be auto populated based on test instance and Midas/Aries info.
member.param: Value to be used as mrslt.
Unit to be appended to msunit.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IMrsltFormat.SetData(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Takes in a value, lower limit, and upper limit and writes Mrslt to the ItuffWriter in the format: [level]_tname_[testInstanceName] [level]_mrslt_[value] [level]_splolim_[spLoLimit] [level]_sphilim_[spHiLimit] Where [level] and [testInstanceName] will be auto populated based on test instance and Midas/Aries info.
member.param: Value to be used as result.
Value to be used as splolim.
Value to be used as sphilim.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IMrsltFormat.SetData(System.Double,Prime.DatalogService.Unit,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Takes in a value, lower limit, upper limit, and unit and writes Mrslt to the ItuffWriter in the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_mrslt_[value] 2_msunit_[unit] 2_splolim_[spLoLimit] 2_sphilim_[spHiLimit] Where [level] and [testInstanceName] will be auto populated based on test instance and Midas/Aries info.
member.param: Value to be used as mrslt.
Unit to be appended to msunit.
Value to be used as splolim.
Value to be used as sphilim.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IRawbinaryFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print Rawbinary data to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IRawbinaryFormat.SetData(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Takes in a binary value and outputs to the ItuffWriter using the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_rawbinary_[msbF/msbL]_[binaryValue] Where msbF/L corresponds to whether msb is first or last.
member.param: Binary value to be printed. Only accepts 1, 0, and x characters.
Boolean for whether most significant bit is first.
member.exception: When the binary value is empty, has more than 3997 characters or contains characters that are not '0', '1', 'X' or 'x'.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IRawbinaryFormat.AddData(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Takes in a binary value and adds it to the ItuffWriter using the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_rawbinary_[msbF/msbL]_[binaryValue] Where msbF/L corresponds to whether msb is first or last.
member.param: Binary value to be printed. Only accepts 1, 0, and x characters.
Boolean for whether most significant bit is first.
member.exception: When the binary value is empty, has more than 3997 characters or contains characters that are not '0', '1', 'X' or 'x'.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IRawbinaryFormat.SetMaxLineLength(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Set the number of bits that can be datalogged. default is 3997.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IRawbinaryFormat.IncludeTnameInPrint(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether to include tname in the first print of the same comntWriter object. Tname is included by Default.
member.param: bool for whether to include tname in the first print. Defaults to false.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IRawbinaryFormat.ClearData
member.summary: Clears ituff writer data.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IRawnhexFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print Rawnhex data to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IRawnhexFormat.SetData(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Takes in a binary value and outputs to the ItuffWriter using the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_rawnhex_[msbF/msbL]_[#of significant bits]_[hexValue of binaryValue] Where msbF/L corresponds to whether msb is first or last.
member.param: Binary value to be printed in hex format. Only accepts 1, 0, and x characters.
Boolean for whether most significant bit is first.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IRawnhexFormat.SetMaxLineLength(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Set the number of bits that can be datalogged. default is 3997.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IScanFiFormat
member.summary: Formatter for ScanFi related items.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IScanFiFormat.SetTnamePrefix(System.String)
member.summary: (Optional) Sets the prefix for printing to the ScanFiWriter. Prefix will be appended in the format: 2_tname_[prefix]_[testInstanceName] Where [testInstanceName] will be auto populated based on test instance info.
member.param: String to be appended to tname.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IScanFiFormat.SetTnamePostfix(System.String)
member.summary: (Optional) Sets the postfix for printing to the ScanFiWriter. Postfix will be appended in the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName]_[postfix] Where [testInstanceName] will be auto populated based on test instance info.
member.param: String to be appended to tname.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IScanFiUltFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print ULT to ScanFi.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IScanFiUltFormat.SetData(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Takes in a value and outputs it to the ScanFiWriter in the format: 2_lotid_[lot] 2_wafid_[wafer] 2_xloc_[xLocation] 2_yloc_[yLocation] .

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ISeparatorFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print lsep tokens to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ISeparatorFormat.SetItuffLevel(System.String)
member.summary: Set the ituff level for this seperator. ituff will hold: [level]_lsep .

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ISpoFiFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print SPOFI data to ScanFi.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ISpoFiFormat.SetInstanceHeader(System.String,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Adds information for instance to Spofi format in the format of: 2_ttype_HDMTG2 2_plist_[plist] 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_fail_limits:min_0_max_[captureCount]_cat_0 Where [testInstanceName] will be auto populated based on test instance info.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ISpoFiFormat.AddPatternHeader(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds information for pattern to Spofi format in the format of: 2_pttrn_[pattern] 2_pattern_mode:[compressed|uncompressed] This will be appended to existing data in Spofi format. Should be used before adding pattern data to delineate a pattern group.
member.param: Indicates if pattern mode is compressed or uncompressed.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ISpoFiFormat.AddPatternHeader(System.String)
member.summary: Add pattern header to spofi when pattern passed.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ISpoFiFormat.AddPatternData(Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.PatternData)
member.summary: Adds information for pattern to Spofi format in the format of: [label] 0 [pin] [scanChainLength] [cyclesFromPreviousLabel] [actualPatternData] -1 [failCycle] # [debugComment] This will be appended to existing data in Spofi format. Should be used after calling AddPatternHeader() in order to delineate a pattern group.
member.param: Pattern data that contains information for previous format.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ISpoFiFormat.AddData(System.String)
member.summary: Add user data to the spofi.
member.param: Data string to add to the SPOFI stream.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.PatternData
member.summary: Scan pattern data to log.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.PatternData.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.PatternData.Label
member.summary: Gets or sets the label name.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.PatternData.Pin
member.summary: Gets or sets the pin name.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.PatternData.ScanChainLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the scan chain length.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.PatternData.CyclesFromPreviousLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets the cycle from previous label where the fail is on.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.PatternData.ActualPatternData
member.summary: Gets or sets the actual pattern data in current pin.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.PatternData.FailCycle
member.summary: Gets or sets the fail cycle where the fail is on.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.PatternData.DebugComment
member.summary: Gets or sets the debug comment.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IStrgaltFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print Strgval data to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IStrgaltFormat.SetData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Takes in a strgalt type and value and outputs it to the ItuffWriter in the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_strgalt_[type]_[value].

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IStrgaltFormat.SetMaxLineLength(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Set the number of bits that can be datalogged. default is 3997.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IStrgvalFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print Strgval data to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IStrgvalFormat.SetData(System.String)
member.summary: Takes in a strgval and outputs it to the ItuffWriter in the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_strgval_[value].

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IStrgvalFormat.SetData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Takes in a strgval and outputs it to the ItuffWriter in the format: 2_tname_[testInstanceName] 2_msunit_[spmDescriptor] 2_strgval_[strgvalValue]
SPM descriptor can be generated by using the StringParsedMetadataHelper class.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IStrgvalFormat.SetDelimiterCharacterForWrap(System.Char)
member.summary: Sets delimiter character for wrapping if strgval value is longer than limit (4000 characters).

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IStrgvalFormat.ForceItuffLevel(System.String)
member.summary: Will force the writer ituff level. Allowed values are "2" or "0".

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IStrgvalFormat.SetMaxLineLength(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Set the number of bits that can be datalogged. default is 3997.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IStrgvalFormat.GetMaxLineLength
member.summary: Returns the max line length that is configured to this object.
member.returns: Max length in chars.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ITsattrsFormat
member.summary: Level 4 tsattrs token.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ITsattrsFormat.SetData(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},System.String)
member.summary:
Ituff 4_tsattrs token formatter. 4_tsattrs_[linesToAdd.key1],[linesToAdd[key1].Value]. 4_tsattrs_[linesToAdd.key2],[linesToAdd[key2].Value].
In case of multiple linesToAdd or longer value than allowed: 4_tsattrs_[linesToAdd.key1]_1,[linesToAdd[key1][0].Value]. 4_tsattrs_[linesToAdd.key1]_2,[linesToAdd[key1][1].Value].

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ITsattrsFormat.SetData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Set a single token, value. Ituff 4_tsattrs token formatter. 4_tsattrs_[token],[value].

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ITsattrsFormat.GetMaxLineLength
member.summary: Returns the max line length that is configured to this object.
member.returns: Max length in chars.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IUddTypeFormat
member.summary: Interface used by DatalogService to print UDDType data to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IUddTypeFormat.SetData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Takes in a uddTypeValue and outputs it to the ItuffWriter in the format: 4_uddtype_[udd header]_[udd value].

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IUddTypeFormat.GetUddHeader
member.summary: Returns the uddHeader.
member.returns: UddHeader.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IUddTypeFormat.GetUddValue
member.summary: Returns the uddValue.
member.returns: uddValue.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.Unit
member.summary: Units that may be printed to ItuffFormat.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.Unit.A
member.summary: A representing Amperes for current measurements.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.Unit.V
member.summary: V representing Volts for voltage measurements.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.Unit.O
member.summary: O representing Ohms for resistance calculations.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.Unit.C
member.summary: C representing Celsius for temperature measurements.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.Unit.M
member.summary: M representing Micrometer for size measurements.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.Unit.S
member.summary: S representing Seconds for time measurements.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.FormatType
member.summary: Format type to apply on top of default datalog spec writer.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.FormatType.DEFAULT
member.summary: Default format, use datalog spec.

member.name: F:Prime.DatalogService.FormatType.PINFINDER
member.summary: Pin Finder tools format.

summary.para: Handles the printing to the ituff.
For more details, see the service SDK.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetAlarmWriter
member.summary: Returns an empty AlarmFormat. Set data with SetData().
member.returns: IAlarmFormat: Allows writing to the ItuffWriter for Alarms.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffMrsltWriter
member.summary: Returns an empty MrsltFormat. Set data with SetData().
member.returns: IMrsltFormat: Allows writing to the ItuffWriter for mrslts.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffComntWriter
member.summary: Returns an empty IComntFormat. Set data with SetData().
member.returns: IComntFormat: Allows writing to the ItuffWriter for comments.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffStrgaltWriter
member.summary: Returns an empty IStrgaltFormat. Set data with SetData().
member.returns: IComntFormat: Allows writing to the ItuffWriter for strgalt data.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffStrgvalWriter
member.summary: Returns an empty IStrgvalFormat. Set data with SetData().
member.returns: IStrgvalFormat: Allows writing to the ItuffWriter for strgval data.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffRawbinaryWriter
member.summary: Returns an empty IRawbinaryFormat. Set data with SetData().
member.returns: IRawbinaryFormat: Allows writing to the ItuffWriter for rawbinary data.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffRawnhexWriter
member.summary: Returns an empty IRawnhexFormat. Set data with SetData().
member.returns: IRawnhexFormat: Allows writing to the ItuffWriter for rawnhex data.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffFailDataWriter
member.summary: Returns an empty IFailDataFormat. Set data with SetData().
member.returns: IFailDataFormat: Allows writing to the ItuffWriter for faildata.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffCompositeWriter
member.summary: Returns an empty ICompositeFormat. Set data with SetData().
member.returns: ICompositeFormat: Allows writing to the ItuffWriter for composite data.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffCompositeStrStrWriter
member.summary: Returns an empty ICompositeStringStringFormat. Set data with SetData().
member.returns: ICompositeStringStringFormat: Allows writing to the ItuffWriter for composite string strings.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffUltWriter
member.summary: Returns an Ituff ULT writer.
member.returns: IItuffUltWriter : Allows writing ULT data to the ItuffWriter.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffEndOfDeviceWriter
member.summary: Returns an Ituff EndOfDeviceFormat writer.
member.returns: IEndOfDeviceFormat : Allows writing EndOfDevice data to the ItuffWriter.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffSeparatorFormatWriter
member.summary: Returns an Ituff SeparatorFormat writer.
member.returns: ISeparatorFormat : Allows writing ituff separator data to the ItuffWriter.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffUddTypeWriter
member.summary: Returns an Ituff UddType writer.
member.returns: IUddTypeFormat : Allows writing uddType data to the ItuffWriter.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffTsattrsWriter
member.summary: Returns an Ituff Tsattrs writer.
member.returns: ITsattrsFormat : Allows writing 4_tsattrs data to the ItuffWriter.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetScanFiSpoFiWriter
member.summary: Returns an empty ISpoFiFormat.
member.returns: ISpoFiFormat: Allows writing to the ScanFiWriter for spofi data.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetScanFiUltWriter
member.summary: Returns an ScanFi ULT writer.
member.returns: IScanFiUltFormat : Allows writing ULT data to the ScanFiWriter.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.AddUddTokens(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IUddTypeFormat})
member.summary: Add UDD writers to Lot Start level 4 operation. Any writer that was added using this operation will be printed when LotStart datalog algorithm will run.
member.param: The instance to record the tokens for.
List of Udd writers to print during LotStart level 4.
member.exception: When two of the UddTypeFormats have a repeated Udd Type with different field records.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.ClearUddTokens(System.String)
member.summary: Clear all the instance's previous udd records.
member.param: The instance name to store the data for.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetStoredUddTypeTokens
member.summary: Add UDD writers to Lot Start level 4 operation. Any writer that was added using this operation will be printed when LotStart datalog algorithm will run. string format: "4_uddtype_[some valid uddtype string]". ****TO BE REMOVED once LotStart flow will be finalized ****.
member.returns: A list of udd tokens from shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.WriteToItuff(Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IDatalogFormatBase,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the contents of an ituff writer to datalog.
member.param: Ituff Format Writer to be written.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.WriteToItuff(Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IDatalogFormatBase,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the contents of an ituff writer to datalog.
member.param: Ituff Format Writer to be written.
Allows this datalog to be queryable later in the TP flow. default is true.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.WriteToItuff(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IDatalogFormatBase},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the contents of a List of ituff writer by order to datalog.
member.param: Ituff Format Writers to be written.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.WriteToItuff(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IDatalogFormatBase},System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the contents of a List of ituff writer by order to datalog.
member.param: Ituff Format Writers to be written.
Allows this datalog to be queryable later in the TP flow. default is true.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.WriteToScanFi(Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IScanFiFormat,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the contents of a ScanFi writer to datalog.
member.param: ScanFi Format Writer to be written.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.WriteToTFile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the contents of a formatted string to Tfile.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.WriteToRaster(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the contents of a formatted string to Raster.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.WriteToTelemetry(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the contents of a formatted string to Telemetry.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.WriteToPpr(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the contents of a formatted string to PowerPremonitionResponse PUDL log.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetItuffSnippetForTname(System.String)
member.summary: Pulls the ITUFF Snippet for a specific Instance.
member.param: The Instance name for pull ITUFF data for.
member.returns: The Ituff Snippet for the required instance.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.FlushAllDataStreamLogs(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Flush all the Data Streams.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.GetLevelSixItuffHeaders
member.summary: Return a string with all ituff Headers to be printed.
member.returns: Return all the lines stored.
member.example:
This shows how to get ituff header to be printed.
var myLevelSixItuffLines = Prime.Services.DatalogService.GetLevelSixItuffHeaders();

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.ClearLevelSixItuffHeader(System.String)
member.summary: Clear Level six ituff header for specific instance Name.
member.example:
This shows how to clear ituff header.
Prime.Services.DatalogService.ClearLevelSixItuffHeader(myInstanceName);

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.AddLevelSixItuffHeader(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add new ituff header line to be printed in Level Six.
member.param: lines to be printed in level six header.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService.AddQueryableItuffTokens(System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Adds ituff tokens for which the data printed to ituff will be saved. Token is the string which appears after 2/0_tname_ in ituff.
member.param: ituff tokens for which the data printed to ituff will be saved.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.Internal.IDatalogService
member.summary: Additional interface for Prime internal usage. Need to cast the main IDatalogService to Internal.IDatalogService to access these methods.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.Internal.IDatalogService.Initialize(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes the service. This function is expected to be called on the PrimeInitializeLibraryTest.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.Internal.IDatalogService.IsMidasEnabled
member.summary: The current status of if is midas enabled.
member.returns: If midas data-logging is enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.Internal.IDatalogService.WriteToItuff(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the contents of a formatted string to Ituff.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.Internal.IDatalogService.WriteToItuff(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes the contents of a formatted string to Ituff.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
Whether or not to save the ituff data to ituff cache.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.Internal.IDatalogService.WriteToScanFi(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the contents of a formatted string to ScanFi.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.Internal.IDatalogService.TryGetTestNameOverride(System.String@)
member.summary: Returns the test name to override if exist by out variable. if it doesn't exist, returns false.
member.param: the test name to used as appear in storage.
member.returns: False, if AltInstanceName doesn't exist in storage, else True.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.Internal.IDatalogService.SetTestNameOverride(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Set instance name to override for the upcoming tname datalogs. This instance name override will be reset at every end instance.
member.param: The alternative instance name to be used.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.Internal.IDatalogService.ClearTestNameOverride(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Clear the current test instance name to override. The default tname will be the current instance name.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.Internal.IDatalogService.GetTnameResolver
member.summary: Gets the TNameResolver.
member.returns: The TName resolver.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.PrimeSpec.IAlarmFormat
member.summary: Writer to write Alarm information to ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.PrimeSpec.IAlarmFormat.SetData(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException.AlarmInfo})
member.summary: Print AlarmInfo to ituff.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.PrimeSpec.IEndOfDeviceFormat
member.summary: Writer to write Unit footer information to ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.PrimeSpec.IEndOfDeviceFormat.SetData(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Print Unit footer to ituff in the following format: 2_lend 3_dvtsteddt_[endDeviceTimeStamp] 3_binn_[bin] 3_curfbin_[fbin] 3_curibin_[ibin] 3_trslt_[trslt] 3_comnt_footer_end .

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.PrimeSpec.AlarmFormat
member.summary: Alarm format class.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.PrimeSpec.AlarmFormat.#ctor(Prime.DatalogService.ITnameResolver,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: If Midas is enabled or not.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.PrimeSpec.EndOfDeviceFormat
member.summary: End of device class.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.PrimeSpec.EndOfDeviceFormat.#ctor(Prime.DatalogService.ITnameResolver,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: If Midas is enabled or not.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.ITnameResolver
member.summary: An interfaces that resolves the tname to use for the current instance.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.ITnameResolver.GetTName(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the Tname to use for the current TP.
member.returns: The tname to use.

member.summary: Internal class ItuffStrDb.

member.summary: AddItuffData.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.ItuffObjDb.GetItuffData(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Get Ituff Data if tname exists.
member.returns: true if instance Name and its data, else returns empty string in out parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.ItuffStrDb
member.summary: Internal class ItuffStrDb.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.ItuffStrDb.AddItuffData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: AddItuffData.
member.param: tname to which the data belongs.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.ItuffStrDb.GetItuffData(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Get Ituff Data if tname exists.
member.returns: true if instance Name and its data, else returns empty string in out parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.LevelSixHeaderContents
member.summary: LevelSixHeaderContents class.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.LevelSixHeaderContents.SetData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Set line to levelSixHeaderLines.
member.param: The instance name of this line.
the line that needs to be set.

member.name: T:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.UddDb
member.summary: UddDb.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.UddDb.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.UddDb.UddtypeRecords
member.summary: Gets or sets uddtype record TOD_[name] --> field comma list.

member.name: P:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.UddDb.UddtypeCreators
member.summary: Gets or sets uddtype record TOD_[name] --> creator instance name.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.UddDb.AddInstanceUddRecords(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Add Instance Udd Records.
member.exception: if found a different definition for this uddtype record,throw an exception with details on the creator.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.UddDb.ClearInstanceUddRecords(System.String)
member.summary: erase all of records created by the same instance from UddtypeRecords and UddtypeCreators.

member.name: M:Prime.DatalogService.StorageItems.UddDb.GetAllRecords
member.summary: concatenate all records from all instances in the DB to a list.
member.returns: list of all records.
